tasks.subject: Task 1: tailscale (CLI + app)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the `tailscale` CLI (brew) and the Tailscale macOS app (cask). No config, no `.zshrc` block.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Brewfile`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- brew tailscale present (starship..tmux); cask tailscale-app present; brew + cask blocks alphabetical; both exist upstream; `brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all` parses.

**Verify:** `grep -q '^brew "tailscale"$' Brewfile && grep -q '^cask "tailscale-app"$' Brewfile && brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all >/dev/null && echo OK`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q '^brew \"tailscale\"$' Brewfile && grep -q '^cask \"tailscale-app\"$' Brewfile && brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all >/dev/null && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["brew tailscale present", "cask tailscale-app present", "brew + cask blocks alphabetical", "both exist upstream", "Brewfile parses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ghostty (terminal)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install the `ghostty` terminal (cask), vendor its config, and add the upstream `.zshrc` PATH line.

**Files:**
- Create: `ghostty/config`
- Modify: `Brewfile`
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ghostty/config byte-identical to upstream; cask ghostty present (font..tailscale-app); ghostty .zshrc block between eza and git; `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` passes.

**Verify:** `diff /Users/bene/src/hollow/dotfiles/ghostty/config ghostty/config && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo OK`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ghostty/config", "Brewfile", "zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "diff /Users/bene/src/hollow/dotfiles/ghostty/config ghostty/config && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ghostty/config byte-identical to upstream", "cask ghostty present alphabetically", "ghostty .zshrc block between eza and git", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: 1Password (app + op CLI)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install the 1Password app and the `op` CLI (both casks), vendor the `op` config-dir `.gitignore`, and add the `op` completion `.zshrc` block.

**Files:**
- Create: `op/.gitignore`
- Modify: `Brewfile`
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- op/.gitignore byte-identical to upstream (`*` / `!.gitignore`); cask 1password + 1password-cli at top of cask block; 1password .zshrc block between brew and bat; `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` passes; no brew/cask deviations vs upstream.

**Verify:** `diff /Users/bene/src/hollow/dotfiles/op/.gitignore op/.gitignore && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo OK`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["op/.gitignore", "Brewfile", "zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "diff /Users/bene/src/hollow/dotfiles/op/.gitignore op/.gitignore && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["op/.gitignore byte-identical to upstream", "cask 1password + 1password-cli at top of cask block", "1password .zshrc block between brew and bat", "zsh -n passes", "no brew/cask deviations vs upstream (comm empty)"]}
```
